title: web-ai-showcase per-demo mobile/desktop support record
description: The `support` object attached to each built models.json entry (mobile+desktop parity invariant). Default new/existing built demos to 'untested' (honest — audits fill this in). A class flips to 'ok' only after a real matrix pass; to 'unsupported' only WITH evidence the class is genuinely unavailable (API/hardware/runtime/model requirement). 'needs-review' = automated-only signal, not a matrix pass. Coverage must be monotonic (ok must never silently drop back).

evidence.description: Why the unsupported class is genuinely unavailable — API/hardware/runtime/model requirement.
